Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

<Aside type="note" title="Curated external (hand-maintained)">
Composed compose-external-wave-10 using authoring SSOT (`docs/src/authoring/skills/rover.mdx`) + research. Do not run `wagents docs generate` on this file (HAND-MAINTAINED sentinel). Run `/review source` before using in production or promoting.
</Aside>

## What It Does

Rover CLI for GraphQL schema management and local supergraph dev: subgraph publish/fetch/check/lint, graph mgmt, supergraph composition, rover dev, auth/config. Core for GraphOS and local federated workflows.

## Harness Coverage

Targets verified harnesses: `antigravity`, `claude-code`, `codex`, `crush`, `cursor`, `gemini-cli`, `github-copilot`, `grok`, `opencode`.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add apollographql/skills --skill apollo-client --skill rover --skill apollo-connectors -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Curated** (`curated-trust-gated`)

Curated status: `install-now-after-trust-gate`

Risk notes: GraphQL client and tooling residual from `apollographql/skills`. Complements the existing server/federation curated row.

`npx skills add apollographql/skills --skill rover -y -g -a antigravity claude-code codex crush cursor gemini-cli github-copilot grok opencode`. status=install-now-after-trust-gate; selector=named. Claude plugin or gh skill alternatives available.
